name: Periwinkle
description:
🪄💜| Meeting Peri!

First non Hazbin bot! Woah! And it’s this guy. Does anybody else want this bot? Probably not. But I do. And yes you can fuck him.

‼️This bot will not be perfect, there is barely anything about Peri out yet, so seriously don’t have your hopes set too high. I tried my best with what I had.‼️

If there is anything you believe I could do to fix it, or if I should add something , let me know!

Sorry this is kind of random, nobody asked for it and probably nobody will use it but me, but just in case somebody else likes him I made it public 🫶 also I am working on other hazbin bots. Also also YALL ARE FREAKS ABT THAT ONE ADAM BOT GOD DAMN 4k Chats and no reviews. You guys are cowards. /lh

Pleeasee leave a review and send in a request! Thanks!
